name: Al-R-G Formula
subscription_pitch: Al-R-G works best with consistent, long-term use — most people do the subscription so they don't have to think about reordering, and it saves 10%.
summary: A system-level allergy formula that works on the root — supporting your liver, immune system, and adrenals. Not fast-acting; builds up over about two weeks. The longer you take it, the better it works. Great for year-round use; once feeling good, you can back off to once daily.
dosing: One full dropper in water, morning and evening. In allergy season, take as needed. For chronic allergies, use year-round. Once adapted, reduce to once daily or take a break. Resume twice daily and pair with Sinease if symptoms return.
pairing_reason: Sinease is fast-acting for flare-ups while Al-R-G builds long-term resilience — they work beautifully together. Also pairs well with Respiratory for anyone dealing with allergy-related breathing issues.

name: Sinease Formula
summary: Fast-acting sinus relief — works within minutes. Clears congestion, relieves pressure, calms itchy eyes and runny nose. Best for acute flare-ups and as-needed use. Pairs extremely well with Al-R-G for anyone dealing with ongoing allergies.
dosing: One full dropper in 1-2 oz of water, up to four times daily when needed. Pair with Al-R-G for allergy congestion; pair with Immune Boost for sinus infections.
pairing_reason: Sinease handles the acute symptoms fast while Al-R-G works on the underlying cause. For sinus infections, Immune Boost adds antiviral and antibacterial support.

name: Respiratory Formula
tagline: Lung support, coughs, and congestion relief
summary: Soothes and clears the lungs — loosens mucus, calms coughs, reduces inflammation in airways. Works well for colds, flu respiratory symptoms, allergies affecting the lungs, asthma, and pollution-related irritation. Pairs with Al-R-G for allergy-related breathing.
dosing: One full dropper in 1-2 oz of water, two to four times daily until symptoms ease. Pair with immune or allergy formulas for extra support.
pairing_reason: Pairs with Al-R-G for anyone with allergy-driven respiratory symptoms. Immune Boost adds infection-fighting support when congestion is from illness.

name: Immune Boost Formula
tagline: Strengthen immunity and fight off illness
summary: Antibacterial, antiviral, and antifungal support — great at the first sign of illness or during cold and flu season. Potent but gentle. Can be used daily for prevention or aggressively at onset of illness.
dosing: At first sign of illness: 1.5 droppers four times daily until symptoms ease, then one dropper twice daily for a week. For daily prevention: one dropper once or twice daily during cold season.
pairing_reason: Works with Sinease for sinus infections (fast symptom relief + immune support) and Respiratory for lung/chest symptoms alongside illness.

name: Inflammaid (Turmeric Extract)
tagline: Chronic inflammation, joint and muscle relief
subscription_pitch: Inflammaid works best with consistent daily use — most people on subscriptions say they notice the difference most when they run out. Saves 10% and keeps you covered.
summary: Liquid turmeric extract with 98% absorption — far more bioavailable than capsules or powder. Reduces chronic inflammation at the cellular level. Significant results typically within days to weeks of consistent use. Pairs with Joint Juice to add lubrication, or Nervaid when inflammation and nerve pain occur together.
dosing: One full dropper in 1-2 oz of water once or twice daily. Consistent use over time is key. Pair with Joint Juice for joint lubrication; with Nervaid when nerve pain is also present.
pairing_reason: Inflammaid reduces inflammation while Joint Juice lubricates the joint — together they address both the pain and the structural issue. When nerve pain accompanies inflammation, Nervaid rounds out the trio.

name: Joint Juice
tagline: Joint lubrication, bone spurs, and flexibility
subscription_pitch: Joint Juice is a long-term investment in your joint health — consistent use is what gets results. The subscription keeps you on track and saves 10%.
summary: Addresses joint health from the inside — stimulates natural synovial fluid (joint lubrication), helps decalcify bone spurs and bunions, and supports cartilage. Works best long-term. Pairs beautifully with Inflammaid.
dosing: One full dropper in 1-2 oz of water once or twice daily, consistently. Pair with Inflammaid for inflammation relief alongside lubrication.
pairing_reason: Inflammaid and Joint Juice are the classic combination — one reduces inflammation, one lubricates. Nervaid can also be added when nerve-related pain is present.

name: Nervaid
tagline: Nerve pain, muscle tension, and nervous system calm
subscription_pitch: Nerve pain tends to be ongoing — a subscription keeps you covered without needing to reorder and saves 10%.
caution: Consult a doctor if you take sedatives or pain medications.
summary: Wild lettuce is a potent natural nerve calmer — relieves nerve pain, quiets muscle spasms, and calms an overactive nervous system. Also helps with anxiety and sleep disrupted by pain. Note: consult your doctor if you're on sedatives or pain medications.
dosing: One full dropper in 1-2 oz of water as needed. Hold under tongue briefly before swallowing for faster effect.
pairing_reason: Nervaid addresses the nerve pain while Inflammaid handles the inflammation — often the two are connected. Joint Juice rounds out the trio for joint-related nerve compression.

name: Mentalert
tagline: Focus, memory, mental clarity without caffeine
subscription_pitch: Most people use Mentalert daily in the morning — a subscription keeps it in your routine and saves 10%.
summary: A nootropic adaptogenic blend — sharpens focus and memory, clears brain fog, calms cortisol. No caffeine crash. Daily morning use builds cumulative benefit over time. Pairs naturally with Sleep/Stress (daytime clarity + nighttime calm).
dosing: One full dropper in 1-2 oz of water each morning. For occasional focus, take as needed before study or creative work.
pairing_reason: Mentalert for daytime clarity, Sleep/Stress for nighttime calm — they complement each other perfectly. Many people find that better sleep actually improves their daytime focus too.

name: Sleep/Stress Formula
tagline: Calm anxiety, ease stress, and support deep sleep
subscription_pitch: Sleep/Stress works best with consistent use — your body retrains toward deeper sleep over time. A subscription means you won't run out right when you need it most, and saves 10%.
summary: Calms without sedating — quiets racing thoughts, relieves daytime tension (half dropper under tongue), and supports deep restful sleep at night (full dropper in bed). Non-habit-forming. Continued use retrains the body toward deeper sleep. Pairs with Mentalert for daytime clarity.
dosing: Daytime stress: half dropper under tongue, hold 3 seconds. Nighttime sleep: one full dropper when in bed, hold 3 seconds before swallowing. Continued use builds effect.
pairing_reason: Mentalert by day, Sleep/Stress by night — the ideal pair for anyone dealing with stress affecting both focus and sleep. Nervaid also pairs well when anxiety shows up physically as tension or nerve sensitivity.

name: Digestaid
tagline: Bloating, heartburn, indigestion, and gut balance
subscription_pitch: For ongoing digestive issues, consistent use is what builds long-term gut comfort. A subscription keeps you covered and saves 10%.
summary: Calming digestive blend — soothes heartburn and acid, relieves bloating and gas, rebalances gut flora, and protects the stomach lining. Works as-needed or for ongoing gut support. Naturally pairs with Detox.
dosing: One full dropper in 1-2 oz of water whenever a meal doesn't agree. For long-term balance, use regularly.
pairing_reason: Digestaid soothes the gut while Detox cleanses the liver and eliminates what's contributing to digestive sluggishness — a natural pair for anyone doing a gut reset.

name: Detox Formula
tagline: Full-body cleanse: liver, kidneys, and gut
summary: A comprehensive cleanse — clears parasites, stimulates liver bile flow, supports kidney filtration, balances metabolism and thyroid, and purifies the blood. Use the whole bottle then rest for a month. Maintenance every three months or when feeling sluggish. Pairs with Inflammaid and Sleep/Stress.
dosing: One full dropper in 1-2 oz of water twice daily. Use until bottle is finished, then rest a month. Maintenance: every three months or when feeling sluggish.
pairing_reason: Inflammaid pairs naturally with a detox to address inflammation alongside toxin clearance. Sleep/Stress supports the body during a cleanse (many people notice improved sleep). Digestaid helps soothe the gut during the cleanse process.

name: Hair of the Dog
tagline: Hangover recovery and acute digestive relief
summary: Natural hangover relief — soothes stomach, protects the liver from alcohol's effects, rehydrates fast, and clears the foggy feeling. Also works great as an as-needed digestive formula for acid reflux and heartburn.
dosing: Hangover prevention: one dropper in water before bed after drinking, another first thing in the morning. Digestive use: one full dropper in a swallow of water as needed for heartburn or after eating something that doesn't agree.
pairing_reason: Sleep/Stress pairs well for nights when alcohol disrupts sleep. Detox is the natural follow-up for anyone wanting to give their liver a more thorough reset.
